name: vbos
description: VBOS (Vireon Bot Operations Studio): all-in-one Discord operations bot and admin web panel for Vireon.

scripts.prisma:generate: npm run prisma:select && prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:generate:ledger: npm run prisma:select && prisma generate --schema prisma/ledger/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:push: npm run prisma:select && prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:push:ledger: npm run prisma:select && prisma db push --schema prisma/ledger/schema.prisma
